user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD disappears because `renderUI(p)` is not called in the PAUSED case. The user wants the game to remain visible without any overlay or "paused" text, but WITH the HUD still showing.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add `renderUI(p)` call in the PAUSED case to keep the HUD visible during pause, matching the visual state of PLAYING but without updates.
